name:
Control room surronding
the reactor core
description:
I'm in a Control room surronding
the reactor core
items_start: Sign `No beverages, Please use Break Room.`
Metal door jammed partially open by remains of a tape recorder
Steps leading down into the reactor core
hints: This is the control room! There is a film cartridge and the reactor core is below. The sign mentions a break room.
GET FILM cartridge. The break room (EAST) is important - the sign says use it for beverages. Steps lead DOWN to the reactor core.
The sign hints: take water to the BREAK ROOM, not here. Pouring water on the control panel will trigger the bomb. Go DOWN to the reactor core.
GET FILM. Do NOT pour water here (shorts the control panel and triggers the bomb). Go EAST to the break room to safely defuse the bomb. Go DOWN to see the bomb.

effects: Message: the water spills on the bomb and

Message: the control panel which immediately shorts out triggering
the bomb

notes: Central control room around the reactor core. Contains the film cartridge. CRITICAL: Do NOT pour water here - it shorts the control panel and triggers the bomb. Pour water in the BREAK ROOM (east, room 20) instead. DOWN leads to the reactor core with the bomb.
